title: neottia puberula
intro: Neottia puberula, also known as the small whorled pogonia, is a terrestrial orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Neottia puberula include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Neottia puberula can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a powder or dried extract.
